package.name: task_dispatch
package.description:
Task-level execution framework for IB-Robot. Orchestrates sequential task plans (waypoints + gripper + waits) by delegating arm motion to moveit_gateway and gripper control to ros2_control trajectory controllers.
Planners (visual_grasp, VoxPoser, etc.) are action clients that send ExecuteTaskPlan goals; this package executes them step by step.
